note: Structured quizzes for the floor-care onboarding course. Seed AFTER db:seed-courses via: npm run db:seed-floor-care-quizzes

questions.questionText: Which of these is maintenance rather than deep cleaning?
options: Keeping the finished result so the next visit is easier
Stripping an old sealer off vinyl

questions.questionText: Why is a childcare floor treated as a higher-risk surface than a back-of-house storeroom?
options: It is always a different material
Children and vulnerable people use it at close range

questions.questionText: Which statement about floor care is allowed under our guardrails?
options: It supports hygiene and reduces soil load
It is medically proven to kill germs

questions.questionText: Why do we work from clean areas toward dirty areas?
options: To avoid spreading soil into areas already cleaned

questions.questionText: Name a correct adjustment when working in an occupied childcare room.
options: Ventilate, isolate wet areas, and keep chemicals away from children
Work faster and skip the rinse

questions.questionText: Why does clean equipment matter?
options: Dirty pads, mops and solution re-deposit soil
It is a legal requirement to shine tools

quizzes.lessonTitle: Knowledge check: WHS, PPE and SDS
quizzes.title: Knowledge check — WHS, PPE and SDS

questions.questionText: How current must an SDS be to be considered current under the model WHS framework?
Where does PPE sit in the hierarchy of controls?
options: The last resort, supplementing higher controls
It is not part of the hierarchy

questions.questionText: You decant a stripper into a spray bottle and will use it later. What must you do?
options: Label the container on its body before use
Leave it for the next worker unlabelled

questions.questionText: Which is correct about Victoria?
options: It uses the model WHS framework
It operates under its own OHS Act and Regulations
It has no chemical safety laws

questions.questionText: Why should you never use a strong acidic cleaner on natural stone?
options: It etches and damages the stone

questions.questionText: What must you confirm before stripping a vinyl floor?
Where do dilution and cure figures come from?
options: The SDS/TDS and the relevant standard

questions.questionText: Where do you get the re-entry time for a freshly sealed floor?
options: There is a fixed national time

questions.questionText: When would you choose encapsulation over hot water extraction in a school?
options: When fast return-to-service in an occupied room matters
When you want the longest dry time

questions.questionText: Why do we rinse / neutralise after cleaning?
options: To remove residue so the floor does not re-soil or stay slippery

questions.questionText: What do you do with a portable RCD each time you plug in?
Which pad choice risks damage?
options: Matching the pad to the surface and task
An aggressive pad on a soft finish

questions.questionText: A circuit keeps tripping the RCD. What is correct?
options: Stop and report a possible electrical fault

questions.questionText: Name a reason a job can fail that is not about cleaning skill.
options: A flat battery, missing tool or damaged hose

questions.questionText: A machine fails its pre-start check. What do you do?
options: Tag it out of service and raise a fault report

questions.questionText: When must the daily pre-start be completed?
options: Only if a machine looks faulty

questions.questionText: What goes up before you make a floor wet?
You must run a lead across a corridor children use. What do you do?
options: Route and manage it so it is not a trip hazard, or find another path
Run several leads to be safe

questions.questionText: Signage for a wet floor is...
options: An administrative control that supplements separating people from the wet area

questions.questionText: A teacher asks you to move because a class is coming through. What is the professional response?
options: Respond politely and adjust your work zone
Pack up and leave the site

questions.questionText: When should you communicate a delay or issue?
options: Early and plainly, as soon as you know

questions.questionText: Where should chemicals never be placed on a childcare site?
options: With the rest of the equipment

questions.questionText: You need a before/after photo but a child’s drawing with names is on the wall. What do you do?
options: Frame it out, or record why no photo was taken
Ask the child to move it

questions.questionText: A Working With Children check means...
options: You have met every child-safe obligation
It is a starting point alongside the code of conduct and supervision
You can be alone with children

questions.questionText: How should you behave regarding CCTV on site?
options: Assume it is operating and act accordingly

questions.questionText: What do you do when you find pre-existing damage during final inspection?
options: Photograph and record it in the notes

questions.questionText: Why does photo evidence and completion notes matter?
options: They prove the work and protect us in disputes

questions.questionText: A job cannot be completed to scope. What is correct?
options: Document it and escalate to the supervisor
Do something not in scope to fill time
